markers: constants.ts contains the primary educational dataset: 5 case tutorials in TUTORIAL_DATA, 15 MCQs in MCQS, and 30 flashcards in FLASHCARDS.
constants.ts also defines PARASITOLOGY_DATA and BACTERIA_DATA with imageKey-driven educational content.
components/BacterialIdAtlas.tsx and components/ParasitologyAtlas.tsx define inline SVG illustrations rather than referencing external image files.
components/InfectionMappingAtlas.tsx contains additional case-based study content with generated images/sketches and quiz logic.
No standalone lecture corpus or algorithm-only dataset was found outside the app/data layer.

summary.notes: This project is a self-contained tutorial/study platform. The actionable payload is embedded in TypeScript data modules and atlas components, not in separate content files.

images.evidence: Defines the Illustrations map and renders bacteria-driven art from BACTERIA_DATA.imageKey.
Defines the Illustrations map and renders parasite art from PARASITOLOGY_DATA.imageKey.

images.kind: study atlas with canvas/sketch and image-backed case cards
images.evidence: Renders case cards with image keys, canvas sketches, and study visuals for vectors/parasites/treatments.

tutorials.evidence: Contains TUTORIAL_DATA, MCQS, and FLASHCARDS used by the topic detail view.

tutorials.kind: tutorial navigation and topic detail assembly
tutorials.evidence: Selects tutorials by topic, attaches MCQs and flashcards, and renders the case-study workflow.

dependencies: App.tsx depends on constants.ts plus Header, ThreeScene, StudyTools, InfectionMappingAtlas, BacterialIdAtlas, ParasitologyAtlas, LinkedText, DeepDiveModal, and LabReport.
components/BacterialIdAtlas.tsx depends on BACTERIA_DATA and BACTERIA_CATEGORIES from constants.ts plus local CSS.
components/ParasitologyAtlas.tsx depends on PARASITOLOGY_DATA from constants.ts plus local CSS.
components/InfectionMappingAtlas.tsx depends on idb-keyval, Chart.js being available globally, and local CSS.
No separate lecture or algorithm source dependency was identified.
recommendation: Migrate the tutorial dataset first by staging constants.ts and the atlas components; there is no separate lecture or algorithm corpus to extract, and image content is implemented as inline SVG/canvas code rather than binary assets.
